reasoning: The control AC-3(13) focuses on attribute-based access control (ABAC), which can be mapped to Kubernetes RBAC with additional attribute constraints. Kubernetes supports ABAC, but it is less commonly used compared to RBAC. However, RBAC can be extended with custom admission controllers or policies to enforce attribute-based access control by using labels and annotations as attributes.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | attribute - based access control enforce attribute-based ac
